## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] Feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)

## How to Review

<!-- Tell reviewers where to start, what to focus on, any gotchas -->

**Review guidance:**
- 🔴 **Blocking** — Security issues, broken functionality, data loss risk (must fix)
- 🟡 **Non-Blocking** — Minor improvements, docs, style (should address)
- 🟢 **Suggestion** — Alternative approaches, future enhancements (optional)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added / updated for all new behavior
- [ ] Self-reviewed all AI-generated code line by line
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or personal data in any file
- [ ] Deployment settings updated if new connection references or environment variables added
- [ ] Solution synced after Dataverse changes (do not edit Solution.xml manually)
- [ ] `.copilot-instructions.md` updated if project conventions changed
